title: Crystal craft
description: This pack is made for Minecraft pvp and bedwars it makes the game more attractive
body:
# Crystal Craft 

A clean and vibrant resource pack for Minecraft 1.8.9, designed to give your world a brighter, sharper, and more polished look while keeping the classic vanilla feel. Perfect for PvP, survival, or casual play.


---

## ✨ Features

### 🎨 Visual Improvements

Enhanced Blocks & Ores – Distinct and glowing ores (diamond, gold, iron, coal, redstone, lapis) for easy identification while mining.

Nature Overhaul – Lusher grass, flowers, vines, and foliage for a more colorful environment.

Refined Stone & Bricks – Clearer textures with subtle shading for caves and builds.


### ⚔️ PvP & Equipment

Custom Weapons & Tools – Unique textures for wooden, stone, iron, gold, and diamond swords, bows, and tools.

Detailed Armors – Redesigned armor sets (diamond, gold, iron, chainmail, leather) with sharp, vibrant outlines for quick recognition.

Item Frames Showcase – High-contrast and clean textures for commonly used PvP/Survival items like potions, enchanted apples, pearls, buckets, books, etc.


💎 General Enhancements

Simplified yet stylish GUI elements.

Brighter diamond and enchanted gear for better visibility in PvP.

Classic Minecraft charm with modern clarity.



---

## 🛠 Compatibility

Minecraft Version: 1.8.9

Resolution: 16x (optimized for performance while still looking polished).

Fully compatible with PvP servers, Survival worlds, and Creative builds.



---

## 📸 Preview

Crystal-clear ores for easy mining.

Brightened environment with vibrant flora.

Redesigned armors & weapons perfect for PvP.

Organized item frames showcasing all major survival/PvP items.



---

## ✅ Ideal For

Players who want performance-friendly textures without sacrificing style.

PvP enthusiasts who need clean and vibrant visuals.

Anyone who loves a fresh yet familiar Minecraft look.
